inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Current age of the dog in complete months.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current age of the dog in complete months.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Köpeğin tam ay cinsinden mevcut yaşı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelles Alter des Hundes in vollendeten Monaten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge actuel du chien en mois complets.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad actual del perro en meses completos.

inputs.label: Current Weight
inputs.businessContext: Current body weight of the dog in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current body weight of the dog in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Köpeğin kilogram cinsinden mevcut vücut ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelles Körpergewicht des Hundes in Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel actuel du chien en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso corporal actual del perro en kilogramos.

inputs.label: Growth Rate Factor
inputs.businessContext: Breed-specific exponential growth rate (k). Small breeds ≈ 0.3, Medium ≈ 0.2, Large ≈ 0.15, Giant ≈ 0.1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Breed-specific exponential growth rate (k). Small breeds ≈ 0.3, Medium ≈ 0.2, Large ≈ 0.15, Giant ≈ 0.1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Irka özgü üstel büyüme hızı (k). Küçük ırklar ≈ 0.3, Orta ≈ 0.2, Büyük ≈ 0.15, Dev ≈ 0.1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rassenspezifische exponentielle Wachstumsrate (k). Kleine Rassen ≈ 0,3, Mittel ≈ 0,2, Groß ≈ 0,15, Riesen ≈ 0,1.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de croissance exponentiel spécifique à la race (k). Petites races ≈ 0,3, Moyennes ≈ 0,2, Grandes ≈ 0,15, Géantes ≈ 0,1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de crecimiento exponencial específica de la raza (k). Razas pequeñas ≈ 0.3, Medianas ≈ 0.2, Grandes ≈ 0.15, Gigantes ≈ 0.1.

inputs.label: Body Condition Score
inputs.businessContext: Veterinary body condition score on a 9-point scale (1 = emaciated, 5 = ideal, 9 = obese).

businessContext_i18n.en: Veterinary body condition score on a 9-point scale (1 = emaciated, 5 = ideal, 9 = obese).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veteriner vücut kondisyon skoru 9 puanlık ölçekte (1 = zayıf, 5 = ideal, 9 = obez).
businessContext_i18n.de: Veterinärmedizinischer Body Condition Score auf einer 9-Punkte-Skala (1 = abgemagert, 5 = ideal, 9 = fettleibig).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Note d'état corporel vétérinaire sur une échelle de 9 points (1 = émacié, 5 = idéal, 9 = obèse).
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación de condición corporal veterinaria en escala de 9 puntos (1 = emaciado, 5 = ideal, 9 = obeso).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
